debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
x : α
h : (x : α) → @Graph.inessential α β G x
hx : x ∈ G.vertexSet
⊢ ¬Matroid.IsColoop (@Graph.matchingMatroid α β G) x

failed_attempts:
intro hc
  have hess := h x
  obtain ⟨M, hM, hxM⟩ := hess
  have hMmax : G.IsMaxMatching M := hM
  have hrank := hMmax.encard
  rw [matchingMatroid] at hc
  simp only [IndepMatroid.matroid, Matroid.IsColoop, Matroid.eRk] at hc
  have hnotbasis := hxM
  have hsize : V(G, M).encard = 2 * ν(G) := by
    rw [← hrank]
    exact (by simp [Set.encard_image2_of_injective, hM.subsingleton_inc])
  have hnotmax := hnotbasis
  contradiction

    · rw [G.matchingMatroid.eRank_def]

  have hcoloop := hc.basis_iff.mpr hbasis

  have hbase : V(G, M) ∈ Matroid.Base (G.matchingMatroid) := by

        · exact hsub hvx
      have h10 : G.matchingMatroid.eRk (V(G)) = G.matchingMatroid.eRank := by
        rw [matchingMatroid, IndepMatroid.matroid_eRk, matchingIndepMatroid]
        simp_all
      have h11 : G.matchingMatroid.eRk (V(G) \ {x}) < G.matchingMatroid.eRk (V(G)) := by
        apply Matroid.eRk_erase_lt_of_mem
        simp_all
      linarith
    exact Set.eq_of_subset_of_subset hsub (by simp_all)
  cases' h6 with h6 h6 <;> simp_all

intro hc
  obtain ⟨M, hM, hxM⟩ := h x
  have hM' : G.IsMaxMatching M := hM
  have hrank : G.matchingMatroid.eRank = 2 * ν(G) := by
    sorry
  have hcoloop : G.matchingMatroid.eRk (V(G) \ {x}) < G.matchingMatroid.eRank := by
    simpa [Matroid.isColoop_iff] using hc
  have hmatch : ∃ M', G.IsMatching M' ∧ V(G) \ {x} ⊆ V(G, M') := by
    use M
    constructor
    · exact hM'.toIsMatching
    · intro y hy
      contrapose! hy
      simp_all
  obtain ⟨M', hM'_match, hsub⟩ := hmatch
  have hencard : M'.encard ≤ ν(G) := by
    apply IsMatching.encard_le
  have hvert : (V(G) \ {x}).encard ≤ 2 * M'.encard := by
    sorry
  have hvert' : (V(G) \ {x}).encard ≤ 2 * ν(G) := by
    linarith
  have hrank' : G.matchingMatroid.eRk (V(G) \ {x}) = 2 * ν(G) := by
    sorry
  linarith
